key.name: neon-color
key.description: Neon tube, dust, and rain color (e.g. #00ffcc)

key.name: underglow
key.description: Neon glow around normal windows, plus GTK decoration shadows (restart apps for the latter)

key.name: music-reactive
key.description: React to system audio with multi-band neon effects

key.name: reverse-rain
key.description: Make the neon rain fall upward instead of downward
